moments.title: Wimbledon 2026
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships begin on June 29, 2026, and run for two weeks at the All England Lawn Tennis Club

angles.name: London Calling
angles.copy: The wait is almost over as Wimbledon gets ready to serve up two weeks of world-class tennis in London

angles.name: Tennis Fever
angles.copy: Get ready for strawberries and cream, Pimm's, and some of the greatest tennis players on the planet as Wimbledon 2026 kicks off

angles.name: The Queue
angles.copy: Will you be joining the famous Wimbledon queue for a chance to see the world's top tennis players in action?

moments.title: British Grand Prix 2026
moments.blurb: The British Grand Prix takes place on July 5, 2026, at Silverstone, marking round 12 of the 2026 F1 season

angles.name: Silverstone Showdown
angles.copy: The British Grand Prix is just around the corner, with the world's top F1 drivers set to battle it out at Silverstone

angles.name: F1 Frenzy
angles.copy: Get ready for the roar of the engines and the thrill of the track as the British Grand Prix comes to Silverstone

angles.name: Racing Legends
angles.copy: Who will be the champion of the British Grand Prix 2026? Will it be a familiar face or a new challenger?

moments.title: Summer Solstice 2026
moments.blurb: The summer solstice, the longest day of the year, takes place on June 24, 2026

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Make the most of the extra daylight hours on the summer solstice, the longest day of the year

angles.name: Summer Vibes
angles.copy: The summer solstice marks the official start of summer, so get ready for warm weather, outdoor fun, and long evenings

angles.name: Midsummer Magic
angles.copy: The summer solstice has been a time for celebration and ritual for centuries, so why not create your own midsummer magic?
